summary: Website project for "Trading Solutions"; user requests adding a purchase/pricing section with three plans and adding stock specialist-related content/sections.

existing_features.title: Add a new Pricing/Purchase section to the landing page that displays three plans with the exact plan names and prices provided by the user: “Foundation plan ; 75k”, “Growth plan ; 125k”, and “Loss recovery Specialist ;175k”. The section must be visually consistent with existing shadcn Card styling and include a clear call-to-action button on each plan (e.g., “Purchase” / “Choose Plan”) that does not require real payment processing (it can scroll to the Contact section or open an on-page inquiry state).

Add a “Stock Specialists” (or equivalent) section to the landing page with stock-specialist-related content (e.g., specialist capabilities, areas of expertise, and what users can expect). The content must be in English and must not promise guaranteed returns; it must remain aligned with the existing educational/disclaimer positioning.
Update the site header navigation to include links to the new sections (Pricing/Purchase and Stock Specialists) while keeping existing links (Home, About, Contact) functional.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a purchase/pricing section with plans: Foundation (75k), Growth (125k), Loss Recovery Specialist (175k)
Add stock specialist-related content/section(s) to the website
